initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, date_dim.d_year
)
SELECT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM (
  SELECT
    y1.c_customer_sk,
    y1.c_customer_id,
    y1.d_year AS year,
    y1.yearly_sales AS current_year_sales,
    y2.yearly_sales AS next_year_sales
  FROM yearly_sales y1
  JOIN yearly_sales y2
    ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
    AND y2.d_year = y1.d_year + 1
) t
WHERE current_year_sales > 0
  AND next_year_sales >= 2 * current_year_sales
GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, date_dim.d_year
),
yearly_with_prev AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    yearly_sales,
    LAG(yearly_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY c_customer_sk ORDER BY d_year) AS prev_year_sales
  FROM yearly_sales
)
SELECT
  c_customer_id
FROM yearly_with_prev
WHERE prev_year_sales IS NOT NULL
  AND yearly_sales >= 2 * prev_year_sales;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, d_year
),
sales_comparison AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year AS current_year,
    yearly_sales AS current_sales,
    LAG(d_year) OVER (PARTITION BY c_customer_sk ORDER BY d_year) AS prev_year,
    LAG(yearly_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY c_customer_sk ORDER BY d_year) AS prev_sales
  FROM yearly_sales
)
SELECT
  c_customer_id
FROM sales_comparison
WHERE prev_year = current_year - 1
  AND prev_sales > 0
  AND current_sales >= 2 * prev_sales
ORDER BY c_customer_id;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year
)
SELECT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM (
  SELECT
    y1.c_customer_sk,
    y1.c_customer_id,
    y1.d_year AS prev_year,
    y2.d_year AS curr_year,
    y1.yearly_sales AS prev_year_sales,
    y2.yearly_sales AS curr_year_sales
  FROM
    yearly_sales y1
    JOIN yearly_sales y2
      ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
      AND y2.d_year = y1.d_year + 1
  WHERE
    y2.yearly_sales >= 2 * y1.yearly_sales
) t
GROUP BY
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, date_dim.d_year
),
yearly_with_prev AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    yearly_sales,
    LAG(yearly_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY c_customer_sk ORDER BY d_year) AS prev_yearly_sales
  FROM yearly_sales
)
SELECT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM yearly_with_prev
WHERE prev_yearly_sales IS NOT NULL
  AND yearly_sales >= 2 * prev_yearly_sales
ORDER BY c_customer_sk, d_year;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year
)
SELECT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM (
  SELECT
    y1.c_customer_sk,
    y1.c_customer_id,
    y1.d_year AS prev_year,
    y2.d_year AS curr_year,
    y1.yearly_sales AS prev_year_sales,
    y2.yearly_sales AS curr_year_sales
  FROM
    yearly_sales y1
    JOIN yearly_sales y2
      ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
      AND y2.d_year = y1.d_year + 1
  WHERE
    y2.yearly_sales >= 2 * y1.yearly_sales
) t
GROUP BY
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id;

candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    d_year
)
SELECT
  y1.c_customer_sk,
  y1.c_customer_id
FROM
  yearly_sales y1
  JOIN yearly_sales y2
    ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
    AND y2.d_year = y1.d_year + 1
    AND y2.yearly_sales >= 2 * y1.yearly_sales
GROUP BY
  y1.c_customer_sk,
  y1.c_customer_id;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, date_dim.d_year
),
doubled_customers AS (
  SELECT
    y1.c_customer_sk,
    y1.c_customer_id,
    y1.d_year AS curr_year,
    y1.yearly_sales AS curr_sales,
    y2.yearly_sales AS prev_sales
  FROM yearly_sales y1
  JOIN yearly_sales y2
    ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
    AND y1.d_year = y2.d_year + 1
  WHERE y1.yearly_sales >= 2 * y2.yearly_sales
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM doubled_customers
ORDER BY c_customer_sk, curr_year;

WITH yearly_sales AS (
  SELECT
    customer.c_customer_sk,
    customer.c_customer_id,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_sales_price) AS yearly_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  GROUP BY customer.c_customer_sk, customer.c_customer_id, date_dim.d_year
),
customer_year_pairs AS (
  SELECT
    y1.c_customer_sk,
    y1.c_customer_id,
    y1.d_year AS curr_year,
    y2.d_year AS prev_year,
    y1.yearly_sales AS curr_sales,
    y2.yearly_sales AS prev_sales
  FROM yearly_sales y1
  JOIN yearly_sales y2
    ON y1.c_customer_sk = y2.c_customer_sk
   AND y1.d_year = y2.d_year + 1
)
SELECT
  c_customer_sk,
  c_customer_id
FROM customer_year_pairs
WHERE prev_sales IS NOT NULL
  AND curr_sales >= 2 * prev_sales
ORDER BY c_customer_sk, curr_year;
